subject: Your delegated `sinister-login` provider wallet is shipped (v0.1.0)

how_to_consume_from_forge.picker_q4_agent_host: Replace your hard-coded {claude, codex} list with the runtime-queried list from `sinister_login.list_providers()` or shell-out `sinister login providers --json`. Use `provider_status()` to filter to only configured ones.
how_to_consume_from_forge.subprocess_spawn: Once a provider is picked, set the relevant env var(s) on the spawned subprocess (per `sinister_login.print_env_for(slug)`). For now Forge keeps spawning `claude --dangerously-skip-permissions <phrase>` since the picker's host field still defaults to claude; widen the dispatcher in PH17.
how_to_consume_from_forge.doctor_probe: `sinister login doctor <slug>` returns ok/configured/reachable for a status pill in the picker.
how_to_consume_from_forge.wallet_state_path: ~/.sinister/login.env (opt-in plaintext only with --allow-plaintext) — operator's vault-MCP integration is future v0.2.0.

what_i_did_NOT_do: did NOT add provider wallets to _vault/ (operator-gated)
did NOT implement actual OAuth flows — those are env-var-first; OAuth comes when operator owns the keys
next_in_my_lane: extend automations/agent-host-routing.md with the 11-provider routing matrix
brain entry: sinister-cli-subcommand-pattern.md (doctrine for next tools)
